label: Blog Image
description: Editorial cover image for blog posts, docs articles, and knowledge content.

optional.name: title
optional.description: Visible title to imply or render in the image

prompt.promptTemplate: Create a professional editorial hero image for a blog post about {{topic}} for {{audience}}.

fragments.subject: {{visualMetaphor}} representing {{topic}}
fragments.style: {{tone}}, modern SaaS editorial illustration, clear and non-ornamental
fragments.composition: wide blog header with strong focal area and generous whitespace for headline placement
fragments.color: {{accentColor}} accents on a restrained neutral palette
fragments.background: minimal textured backdrop suitable for article headers
